global.description: The ad features a vibrant pink background with a clear focus on a discount offer and product images.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale with significant discounts and free shipping.

elements.label: Pink background
elements.description: A solid pink background fills the entire banner, providing a vibrant and eye-catching base.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: The logo 'LuxShelf' is displayed prominently at the top in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Three product images
elements.description: Three rectangular product images with a slight reflection effect, arranged horizontally in the center.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small circular badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: Discount offer text
elements.description: Text stating 'Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25' in a clear, readable font, centered below the product images.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Learn more' in a contrasting color, located at the bottom center.

elements.label: $4.99 price tag
elements.description: A price tag displaying '$4.99' in a bold font, positioned below the discount offer text.

elements.label: Visual accents
elements.description: Subtle decorative elements around the product images, enhancing the overall aesthetic without distracting from the main content.

elements.label: Element
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25

embedding_texts.global_text: LuxShelf, unknown, banner, bright and playful, featuring a sale and product images.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by product images in the center, with the discount offer text below and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: LuxShelf, SALE, Up to 40% off Free shipping over $25, $4.99, Learn more
